name: aetherhub
description: AetherHub Skill Marketplace - Discover, search, and execute skills from the AetherHub marketplace directly within Claude Code
author: AetherHub Team

skills.name: aetherhub-discover
skills.description: Search and discover skills from AetherHub marketplace. Use when user wants to find a skill for a specific task.

skills.name: aetherhub-execute
skills.description: Execute a skill from AetherHub marketplace on the current codebase. Use when user wants to apply a skill to their project.
